title: athyrium kandelii
intro: Athyrium kandelii, also known as Kandel's lady fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the Athyrium genus of flowering plants. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Athyrium kandelii include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in traditional medicine. The herbal preparations of Athyrium kandelii include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat respiratory issues, wounds, and skin conditions.
